query.title: Mezmo Query
query.description: Mezmo search query for error logs (e.g. '(level:error OR level:fatal) tag:production app:my-app')

mezmoServiceKey.title: Mezmo Service Key
mezmoServiceKey.description: Mezmo service key for API authentication (starts with 'sts_'). See https://docs.mezmo.com/docs/ingestion-key#service-keys-sts

debug.title: Debug Mode
debug.description: Save raw MCP responses for debugging

slackToken.title: Slack Token
slackToken.description: Slack Bot OAuth token for sending notifications

slackChannel.title: Slack Channel
slackChannel.description: Slack channel name (e.g. '#my-channel' or 'my-channel') or channel ID (e.g. 'C0123456789'). Requires slackToken to be set.

day.title: Day to Analyze
day.description: Which day to analyze: 'today' (current UTC day so far), 'yesterday' (full previous UTC day), or 'last24h' (last 24 hours from now).

daysBack.title: Days Back
daysBack.description: Number of days before the selected day to use as the comparison baseline.

minCount.title: Minimum Count
minCount.description: Minimum number of occurrences for an error to be included in the results.
